title: "The day Charlie was k****d.....": Candace Owens' latest Charlie Kirk theory sparks fierce response from critics
summary_full: Candace Owens' latest comments about Charlie Kirk's death sparked renewed backlash after critics challenged her claims on social media. One viral post accused Owens of promoting a disputed "body double" theory and argued that available security footage contradicts her narrative. The exchange fueled fresh online debate, with critics urging people to rely on verified evidence and official court proceedings instead of unverified speculation surrounding the high-profile case.
